@Albrooksall
近期的k线大约20个tick
最小刮头皮目标：大多数市场
高
日均波幅大约100个tick，  
所以10%是10个tick  
  
最小刮头皮目标取两者中较大的，因此是20个tick
如果不清楚最小刮头皮规模是多少，  
确保它至少与以下两者一样大：  
近期平均k线的高度  
近期日均波幅的5-10%
例外情况：  
Emini是4个tick  
NQ是2-4点，US是4-8个tick，  
这取决于k线的大小

Minimum Scalp Objective: Is Like Wanting Minimum Wage 
EURUSD 5 min 
The minimum grade to graduate college is a D 
Would you be happy if your son proudly told you that 
his goal in life was to get a D, or to make the minimum wage? 
Successful traders who take 10 pip scalps do so 
only when it is appropriate 
I have never met a trader who is making a living 
only going for minimum scalps 
There are many reasons for this, and overhead is one 
The combination of spread, commissions, slippage, 
and mistakes become proportionally so big that 
a trader needs to win 90% of trades consistently for years 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 11 
@Albrooksall
  
  
  
  
  
大学毕业的最低成绩是D等级
如果你的儿子自豪地告诉你他的人生目标是得D，或是赚取最低工资，你会开心吗？
成功的交易者在合适的情况下才会获取10点的刮头皮盈利
我从未见过仅靠追求最低刮头皮盈利就能谋生的交易者
这其中有很多原因，运营成本是其中之一
点差、佣金、滑点以及错误的总和变得如此之大，以至于交易者需要连续多年赢利90%
最小刮头皮目标：就像想要最低工资一样
的交易才能维持下去

将波段转换为刮头皮：如果前提改变
如果在进入波段后前提发生变化，  
在盈亏平衡点附近或以小额刮头皮离场
  
  
  
  
  
概率倾向于回调（小幅反弹）
大多数空头会在
多头反转k线之上获利了结，
收盘接近其高点
将波段转换为小额刮头皮
这是过去20根k线中最大的阴线。
可能出现衰竭
在L1附近做空，
但出现了2根十字星和连续的卖出高潮，

缺口。

■ Stop orders 
■ Limit orders

■ Market and other orders

Slide 1 
@Albrooksall
  
  
  
止损订单
限价订单
一篮子订单订单
市价及其他订单

Most traders will only use 4 types of orders: 
Stop orders 
Limit orders 
Bracket orders 
Market orders 
These choices are available 
in the software that your broker gives you 
to enter and exit trades 
Most traders should almost always enter 
with stop orders 
To enter or exit a trade with a sell stop order, 
you place the order below the current price 
If the market reaches that price, 
your order gets filled 
To enter or exit a trade with a buy stop order, 
you place the order above the current price 
As soon as you enter, 
always place protective stop 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 2 
@Albrooksall
4种订单类型：止损订单
  
  
  
 
  
  
  
  
  
  
  
  
  
止损订单
限价订单
一篮子订单
大多数交易者只会使用4种类型的订单：
市价订单
这些选项在你的经纪商提供的软件中可用
用于进入和退出交易
大多数交易者应该几乎总是使用止损订单进入
要使用止损空单进入或退出交易，
你需要将订单放置在当前价格之下
如果市场到达那个价格，
要使用止损多单进入或退出交易，
你需要将订单放置在当前价格之上
一旦入场
始终设置保护性止损
你的订单就会被执行

Order Types: Most Important Is Protective Stop 
Most important order for all trades 
is protective stop 
Protects you from huge loss 
if the market goes against you 
Protects you from yourself! 
When in a losing trade, 
beginners resist admitting they are wrong 
They don't want to take a loss 
Afraid their account will disappear 
± --11 
Death of dream of being a successful trader 
A bear places his stop above the current price 
If the market touches the stop, 
his order is filled and his position is closed 
A bull places his stop below the current price 
If the market touches the stop, 
his order is filled and his position is closed 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 3 
@Albrooksall
  
  
  
  
多头将其止损设置在当前价格之下
订单类型：最重要的是保护性止损
如果市场触及止损，
他的订单被执行，他的仓位被
空头在其止损设置在当前价格之上
如果市场触及止损，
他的订单被执行，他的仓位被平仓
平仓
对于所有交易而言最重要的订单是保护性止损
保护你免受巨大损失。如果市场对你不利
也保护你不自我伤害
在亏损交易中，初学者往往不愿承认他们错了  
他们不想承受亏损，害怕他们的账户会消失  
这是成为成功交易者的梦想破灭

Black Swans: Protect Yourself from the Unknowable 
New, unanticipated market events exist and 
current systems are not designed 
to prevent them 
Black swan events are real 
Just because you never saw a black swan 
does not mean they do not exist 
However, it does mean they are uncommon 
and therefore low probability events 
± 
Software and hardware developers do not know 
what is unknowable 
They cannot design software and hardware 
to cover all possibilities 
All broker software and exchanges 
get overwhelmed and fail every 10 years or so, 
even though your broker will deny it 
I have seen this several times in the past 30 years 
1987 Crash, down 25% in one day 
2010 Flash Crash, down 9% in 36 minutes 
Before my time, 1929 Black Friday, 
down 90% in 3 years 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 4 
@Albrooksall
黑天鹅事件：保护你自己免受未知的影响
所有的经纪商软件和交易所  
大约每十年左右就会因不堪重负而崩溃一次，  
即便你的经纪商会否认这一点  
在过去30年里我已经见证了几次这样的情况  
1987年的股灾，一天之内下跌25%  
2010年的闪电崩盘，36分钟内下跌9%  
在我之前的时代，1929年的黑色星期五，  
三年内下跌
新的、未曾预料的市场事件存在，  
当前的系统并未设计  
来防止它们的发生

风险0.57

保护性止损：缺口可能导致无法起到保护作用！
同一张图表，但现在显示的是接下来的一天。
止损在开盘价88.94被触发成交，
因为这是首个低于止损价格的交易。
损失了1,242个点，而不只是54个点。
外汇市场有时会出现小缺口，偶尔会有巨大的缺口，就像这次一样，
保护性止损单可能会在比预期差很多的价格成交，有时并不能提供保护！
在阳线的上方1.0190做多，空头突破失败后出现微型双底
止损设在1.0136，位于反转底部之下，
风险为54个点，
风险指的是最小风险，
因为订单直到首个低于止损的交易才会成交，
如果首个交易远低于止损位，则损失会大得多

限价订单

Limit Order: To Take Profits or to Enter Trade 
To enter or exit a trade with a limit order, 
market usually {90% of time) has to go 
through the limit order price 
before order is filled 
Buy above bull bar 
PB from BO to new high 
± 
Scalper might instead place 
his limit order to sell at prior high, 
as long as profit wou Id be 
at least as big as minimum scalp 
Bear scalper will sell 
with limit order there as well, 
betting on failed BO 
Scalper might want to exit at minimum scalp 
Places limit order to sell at that price 
Once market goes above, 
he knows he will be filled at {rarely above) his price 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 10 
@Albrooksall
要通过限价订单入市或离市，
市场通常（90%的时间）需要达到该限价订单的价格才能成交。
刮头皮交易者可能会将限价空单设置在
之前的高位，只要利润至少与最小刮头
皮交易的盈利相等。
做空的刮头皮交易者也会在那里设置限
价空单，押注突破会失败。
刮头皮交易者可能希望在最小刮头皮盈利时离场，因此他在该价位设置限价空单。
一旦市场价格升至该价位之上，他就知道自己的订单将以该价位（或极少数情况下高于该价位）成交。
限价订单：用于止盈或入市交易
在阳线之上做多，
从突破到新高的回调。

Limit Order: To Take Profits or to Enter Trade 
To enter or exit a trade with a limit order, 
market usually (90% of time) has to go 
through the limit order price 
before order is filled 
Scalper might want to exit at minimum scalp 
Places limit order to buy at that price 
Once market goes below, 
l 
he knows he will be filled at (rarely below) his price 
Scalper might instead place 
his limit order to buy at prior low, 
as long as profit would be 
at least as big as minimum scalp 
Bear scalper will sell with limit order at prior high, 
betting on failed BO and reversal down 
Bull scalper might buy at prior low, 
betting on failed BO and reversal up 
(not yet here)

要通过限价订单入市或离市，
市场通常（90%
限价订单：用于止盈或入市交易
的时间）
需要达到该限价订单的价格才能成交。
刮头皮交易者可能希望在最小刮头皮盈利时离场，因此他在
该价位设置限价多单。一旦市场价格降至该价位之下，他就

做空的刮头皮交易者会在之前的高位设置限价空单，
押注突破失败并反转下跌。
押注突破失败并反转上涨（尚未出现这种情况）。

一篮子订单

Bracket Order: To Take Profits and to Minimize Loss 
Bracket order is a combination of two orders 
used to exit trade: 
Profit taking limit order 
Protective stop order 
Also called ''OCO'' 
(''Order Cancels Order'' or 
''One Cancels Other'') 
Most traders should have a bracket order 
attached to their entry order 
As soon as you place your order to enter, 
software creates, but does not place, 
bracket order to exit 
Trader decides how far both orders should be 
They do not have to be same distance from entry 
Some traders use 2 or more limit orders 
to scale out of profits as market goes their way 
As soon as entry order is filled, 
software then places the bracket order 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 13 
@Albrooksall
止盈限价订单
保护性止损订单
交易者决定这两个订单应该距离入场点有多远，
它们不必与入场点保持相同的距离。
一些交易者会使用2个或更多的限价订单，
当你下单入市的同时，
软件会创建但不会立即创建一篮子订单来退出
随着市场朝着对他们有利的方向发展，逐步止盈。
也称为“OCO”（“Order Cancels Order”或“一个取消另一个”）一旦入场订单成交，
软件随后就会创建一篮子订单
大多数交易者都应该在他们的入场订单上附加一个一篮子订单
一篮子订单：用于止盈和最小化损失
一篮子订单是一种结合了两个订单的工具，用于退出
交易：

Bracket Order for Short: Take Profits and Minimize Loss 
Bear places stop to sell below prior bar 
He has attached bracket order 
As soon as his sell order is filled, 
his broker places a bracket order 
Here, was planning to swing trade /' 
He placed his profit taking limit order 
far below his entry 
As soon as stop order got filled, 
software then cancelled his limit order 
Q 
Here, market hit his protective stop 
above the bear trend high 
Exited with loss

市价订单与其他订单

Most traders should almost always 
enter with stop order 
and exit with stop or limit order 
Sometimes trader has to make quick decision 
to exit or enter 
Sometimes better to get in or out immediately 
and not wait for stop to be hit 
or for pullback to fill limit order 
All software allows for ''Market Order'' 
If you place a buy market order to enter or exit, 
order will be immediately filled at the offer 
If you place a sell market order to enter or exit, 
order will be immediately filled at the bid 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 17 
@Albrooksall
大多数交易者几乎总是
市价订单：用于离市或入市交易
应当使用止损订单入市，
并使用止损或限价订单离市。
有时交易者需要迅速做出决定来离市或入市。
有时最好立即进出，而不是等待止损被触发
或是等待回调来成交限价订单。
所有软件都允许创建“市价订单”。
如果你创建做多市价订单来入市或离市，
订单会立即以卖价成交。
如果你创建做空市价订单来入市或离市，
订单会立即以买价成交。

Bull wanted to buy reversal up for scalp, 
but wanted to see strong entry bar 
As bull trend bar was forming, 
he bought at the market 
As soon as his order got filled, 
his software placed a bracket order 
Or, he placed it manually 
Profit taking Sell limit order was filled 
Stop order below was cancelled automatically

Other Orders: Many Brokers Offer Many Other Order Types 
Stop limit and marketable limit orders 
Mostly used for protection against 
floor traders and 
unethical brokers and firms 
Most traders never use them 
anymore now that computers 
fill orders 
Much better to avoid all other order types 
No benefit on most trades 
When beneficial, rarely much benefit 
Will make more money by focusing on 
managing trades well than using 
other types of orders 
Forex charts are not based on actual trades 
Often based on the bid or the ask, 
and there may never have been a trade 
at that price 
This means that the chart can look like 
a stop or limit order should have been filled, 
but it was not 
I discuss this in the videos on Forex Basics 
in the Main and Forex courses 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 21 
@Albrooksall
这意味着图表看起来像是应该已经触发了止损或限价订单，
其他订单：许多经纪商提供多种其他类型的订单
但实际上并没有成交。
我在主课程和外汇课程的基础视频中有讨论这个问题。
外汇图表并不基于实际的交易，
通常是基于买价或卖价，
而在那个价位可能从未有过交易发生。

Stop limit and marketable limit orders 
Mostly used for protection against floor traders and unethical brokers and firms 
止损限价订单和可执行限价订单
主要用于防范场内交易员以及不道德的经纪商和公司
Most traders never use them anymore now that computers fill orders 
大多数交易者现在已经不再使用这些订单
现在由计算机来执行订单，
Much better to avoid all other order types 
No benefit on most trades 
When beneficial, rarely much benefit 
最好避免所有其他类型的订单，
在大多数交易中并无益处，
即便有益，也很少带来显著的好处。
Will make more money by focusing on managing trades well than using other types of orders
专注于良好地管理交易，
比起使用其他类型的订单，
这样能赚更多的钱。

Broker Not Held: Mistakes Are Always Your Fault 
If the market reaches a price 
that should have filled your order, 
but your order does not get filled, 
call your broker 
99% of the time, you made a mistake with 
your order, but did not realize it 
1% of the time, it is the broker's fault 
or the exchange's fault 
When you opened your account, 
you signed your contract with the broker 
You agreed to a ''Not Held'' clause 
Broker is not held responsible for any 
problems filling or not filling orders 
If you are unhappy with a fill or no fill, 
it is always your fault, even if it is not 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 22 
@Albrooksall
如果市场达到了应该成交你的订单的价格，
但你的订单却没有成交，你应该联系你的经纪商。
你同意了一个“免责”条款，
经纪商对于订单的成交与否不负责任。
如果你对成交或未成交不满意，
经纪商免责：错误永远是你的责任
99%的情况下，是你在下单时出了错，但你自己没有意识到；
1%的情况下，是经纪商或交易所的问题。
当你开设账户时，你签署了与经纪商的合同。
那总是你的责任，即使事实并非如此。

@Albrooksall
入市交易：使用止损订单
追求的盈利目标至少应与止损
（风险）相同大小或两倍之多。
初学者应当只使用止损订单入市，希望趋势能通过市场朝他期望的方向哪怕只移动一个tick/pip就能将他带入交易。
将初始保护性止损设在信号
K线下方1个tick/pip的位置。
当市场交易价格高于信号K线1个tick/pip时，止损多单变成市价订单并成交。
要使用止损订单做多（在紫色价位买入做多），在前一根K线（即信号K线
）的高位上方1个tick/pip的位置创建止损多单。
在大量成交的市场中，通常不会有滑点（以止损订单价格成交）。

Good during 
swings or trends 
+• 
Entering with stop order is 
buying or selling BO of prior bar 
Betting on profitable BO 
Stop orders are bad in Tight Trading Ranges 
Breakouts fail so stop orders lose money 
1i

止损订单：最适合在趋势中使用
因为突破往往会失败，导致止损订单亏损。
在波动或趋势期间表现良好。
使用止损订单入市相当于
押注于盈利的突破。
在紧密交易区间中，止损订单表现不佳，

入市交易：使用限价订单
这对止损入市不利，

空头使用限价订单在之前
高位及上方做空
押注向上突破会失败。
那么押注突破失败会更好，
但对限价订单入市有利。
低于K线的影线意味着下方有多头买家
高于K线的影线意味着上方有空头
多头使用限价订单在之前低位及下方做多，押注向下突破会失败。

那么做多和做空
对止损订单不利：意味着对限价订单有利
止损订单的成功概率就会降低。
可以把止损订单和限价订单
大的阳线，但在强烈的下跌走势段之后可能
进入交易区间，做多的成功率较低。
视为同一笔交易的对立面。
如果K线很大，那么风险也就很大
低成功率加上大风险意味着
止损订单的数学计算不利，
大K线意味着风险也大，上方更有可能有空头卖家，所以空头会在上方用限价订单做空而对于限价订单则数学计算有利

Stop Orders and Limit Orders: Are Equal and Opposite 
For every trade, one institution is buying 
and another is selling, and both are rational trades 
Bulls buy with stop, betting on successful BO 
Bears sell with limit order, 
betting on failed BO and reversal down 
t

Slide 8 
@Albrooksall
对于每一笔交易，总有一个机构在买入做多，
而另一个在卖出做空
止损订单和限价订单：是对等且相反的
，而且这两边都是理性的交易。
多头使用止损订单做多，押注于成功的突破；
空头使用限价订单做空，押注于失败的突破和反转下跌。

Stop Orders and Limit Orders: Are Equally Effective 
On average, the probability that the market 
is going up or down is about the same 
Winning sell limit order 
A limit order (or market order) wins 
about as often as a stop order 
Beginners should only use stop orders 
(or market and limit orders in the 
direction of strong trend) 
Winning sell stop order 
t 
Expert traders can use limit orders 
just as often as stop orders

Slide 10 
@Albrooksall
止损订单和限价订单：同样有效
平均而言，市场上涨或下跌的概率大致相同。
初学者应当只使用止损订单（或在强烈趋势方向上的市价和限价订单）
获胜的做空止损订单
限价订单（或市价订单）获胜的频率大约与止损订单相同。
高手可以像使用止损订单一样频繁地使用限价订单。

stop is below bottom of bull leg so big risk 
Buying at top of TR is low probability 
Stop 
TR is Limit Order Market (LOM) 
Better to look to enter with limit orders, 
selling near top, buying near bottom 
t

more likely bulls buying with stops will lose money 
Bears selling w ith limit orders will make money

在交易区间的顶部做多的成功率
交易区间：
是限价订单市场，因此要低价买入
很低。
做多
如果多头在交易区间内大的多头走势段顶部的信号K线上方做多，止损设在多头走势段
高风险和低成功率意味着
多头使用止损订单做多更可能会亏钱，
而空头使用限价订单做空则更可能赚钱
底部下方，因此风险很大。

stop is above top of bear leg so big risk

is low probability 
Stop

more likely bears selling with stops will lose money

趋势：订单类型
在强势的趋势中，订单类型并不重要，必须按照趋势方向入市（在这里，只能做空
空头会在K线上方使用限价订单做空，
押注反转会失败。
），使用止损、限价或市价订单入市
空头会在强劲的阳线收盘时使用市价订单或限价订单做空，
押注多头突破和反转会失败。
他们在K
当通道很紧时，
空头会使用市价订单做空。
在强烈空头趋势中，空头将在强势阴线的收盘附近做空
线接近其低点收盘时立即以限价或市价订单卖出做空
空头会在回调（看跌旗形）下方使用止损订单，止损订单设在做空信号K线下方不远处做空。

Slide 3 
@Albrooksall
紧密交易区间
不利于止损订单入市
可以等待第三个信号，
当不确定时，有三种选择：
等待第二个或第三个信号出现好的信号K线
等待强势的突破并伴随后续走势
当不确定时：等待第二个信号
离场并等待
但最好是等待
强势的空头突破，
微型双重底，因此出现了两次失败的空头突破。
具有更低低点的主要趋势反转，因此形成双重底和第二次多头反转
良好的后续走势。

止损决定了仓位大小
为什么使用止损？

Skilled Traders: Always Have Protective Stop in the Market 
Stop protects you against yourself 
Emotions can influence decision making 
Without stop working in the market and 
not just in your head, you will let losses grow 
and grow, and grow 
Stop means stop what you are doing 
It is absolute 
Get out and don't question it 
Wait for next signal 
Several reasonable choices for stop 
Most would get out here, 
below bottom of 
most recent bull BO 
Does not matter where you buy 
Management is the same and is based on what the 
market is doing NOW, not when you bought 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 2 
@Albrooksall
熟练的交易者：在市场上总是设有保护性止损
几种合理的止损选择
止损意味着停止你当前的操作，这是绝对的。
大多数人都会在这里出局，
在最近的多头突破底部下方
出局并且不要质疑它，
等待下一个信号。
做多的位置并不重要，管理方式是一样的，基于市场现在的表现，而不是你做多时的情况

Stop protects you against yourself 
Emotions can influence decision making 
Without stop working in the market and 
not just in your head, you will let losses grow 
and grow, and grow
止损可以保护你不受自身情绪的影响  
情绪可能会影响你的决策  
如果没有实际设置好的止损来在市场上运作，  
而不仅仅停留在你的脑海里，你将会让损失不断扩大  
再扩大，而且还会继续扩大

Price action stop 
Most common and best for beginners 
Based on price action (low of bar, leg, or TR) 
Below support like below signal bar or bottom of 
most recent strong bull leg that broke to a new high 
Wide stop 
Buy Higher Low in early bull trend 
Strong bull reversal bar 
Most traders only think of stops as 
either wide or tight 
~ Many also use other terms 
Trailing stop 
After strong BO to new high, 
Raise stop to below bottom of bull leg 
Money stop 
10 ticks/pips below low of signal bar 
or $100 below entry 
Either money stop or price action stop 
Based on Measured Move 
or on higher time frame 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com

@Albrooksall
保护性止损：几种类型
大多数交易者只将止损视为要么宽松要么紧密。
宽幅
许多人也使用其他术语。
基于测量移动
或基于更高时间周期
止损
要么是资金止损，要么是价格行为止损
 
在早期多头趋势中在更高的低点附近做多，强势多头反转K线

Price action stop 
Most common and best for beginners 
Based on price action (low of bar, leg, or TR) 
Below support like below signal bar or bottom of 
most recent strong bull leg that broke to a new high
价格行为止损
最常见且最适合初学者
基于价格行为（K线的低点、走势段或趋势区域）
在支撑位下方，例如信号K线的下方或是最近强劲多头走势段底部突破至新高的下方
Money stop
 10 ticks/pips below low of signal bar or $100 below entry
资金止损
在信号K线的低点下方10个跳点/点，或在入场价位下方
Trailing stop
 After strong BO to new high, Raise stop to below bottom of bull leg 
追踪止损
在强劲突破至新高后，将止损提高到多头走势段底部下方
$100

Protective Stop: Several Reasonable Choices 
Most pros get out on stop below 
bottom of most recent strong leg 
(major higher low} 
Some exit on close of big bear reversal bar, 
since high probability of 2nd Leg Down after 
close on low and below low of past 20 bars 
Many chances to buy bull trend 
Others use wide stop below bottom of bull channel 
or below low of entire leg up

Size of Stop: Determines Position Size 
Decide on logical stop location 
Adjust position size to contain risk 
Rely on stop as long as premise still valid!

Assume this is your average risk 
Buy BO above bull flag 
Stop below 
last BO

Make sure total dollars at risk are 
within your comfort zone 
will not trade properly and lose money 
Trade small: trade the ''I don't care!'' size

在看涨旗形上方的突破
止损的大小：决定了仓位的大小
做多

钱。交易小仓位：交易“
我不在乎！”的规模。

last BO

bottom of 8 bar bull Micro Channel, 
since that is clearly start of bull trend

Protective Stop: Trailing Stop in Bull Trend 
After each new high, 
several choices to tighten (raise or trail) stop 
Most traders raise to just below 
most recent H L if strong BO to new high 
If too far, trail below any support level 
Move stop to breakeven is usually bad idea 
Bulls buy close of strong BO

多头在强势突破的收盘时
每次创下新高后，
保护止损：多头趋势中的移动止损
有几个选择来收紧（提高或移动）止损
如果强势突破至新高，大多数交易者将止损提
高到最近高低点下方不远处
如果距离过远，则在任何支撑位之下移动止损
将止损移到盈亏平衡点通常不是一个好主意
做多

Any reasonable stop is good 
Results are the same for all methods after many trades 
Tight stops lose less, but lose more often 
Wide stops lose less often, but more per loss

保护止损：移动止损
紧密的止损损失较少，但损失频率更高
任何合理的止损都是好的。在多次交易后，所有方法的结果相同。
宽松的止损损失频率较低，但每次损失更多
在突破K线之下
在突破走势段之下
在50%
在紧缩通道中的多头趋势底部下方，因为这是更高时间周期上的突破，将止损设在突破下方是好的
回调位之下或者使用资金止损

强势趋势：为什么止损设在50%回撤位之外一点？
如果在高位做多是因为相信市场处于强势趋势中，
而将止损设在上涨走势段底部下方太远，
一个好的替代方案是将止损设在50%的回撤位下方一点点。
如果价格跌破50%，然后又反转上涨，
如果仍然认为多头掌控局势的话，可以再次做多。
在强势上涨中，多头会在50%的回撤位做多。
如果价格大幅跌破50%，
止损设在50%回撤位下方一点点
那么市场仍处于强势上涨的前提就不太可能成立。

Breakeven Stop: Rarely Logical Choice 
Breakeven stop means moving stop 
to around entry price 
after the market goes your way 
0 
If sell and move stop to entry price, 
get out with either small gain or loss 
Breakeven does not have to be exact 
If stop is hit, 
only lose brokerage cost and slippage

交易者等式与风险

Trader's Equation: Only Trade If Positive 
Only take a trade if: 
(Probability of success) x (Reward ) > (Probability of failure) x (Risk) 
• 
Stop 
Buy High 2 Bull Flag 
Deep PB, but held above bottom of bull BO 
Probability of profit is about 50% 
Risk is from entry price down to stop 
This is how much you are risking initially 
Different traders use different stops 
No agreement on Initial Risk 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 2 
@Albrooksall
只有在以下情况下才进行交易：
(成功的概率) × (回报) > (失败的概率) × (风险
交易者等式：只有在正向的情况下才进行交易
)
风险是从入场价格到止损点的距离
这是你最初承担的风险金额
不同的交易者使用不同的止损点
在H2看涨旗形附近做多
深度回调，
但保持在多头突破波段底部上方
获利的概率大约是50%
对于初始风险没有共识

Positive Trader's Equation: How Much Reward Needed? 
Can calculate smallest target needed for 
Trader's Equation to be positive 
This means the math supports the strategy 
and it is a good trade 
• 
Stop 
Reasonable minimum target 
for most trades is 2x risk 
Since probability not 60%, better to go for 
reward that is at least 2x risk

Profit Targets in Bull: Are Resistance 
Traders look for reasons to take profits 
Math must be good 
Many take profits at 2x Actual Risk 
When probability is high, lx is okay 
Profit taking at lx and 2x often causes PB 
PB tells you that computers are taking profits 
Since profit targets lead to pullbacks, they are 
resistance in bull (sell off when bulls take profits) and 
support in bear (bounce when bears take profits) 
Some traders scalp in opposite direction at targets

的位置获利了结

由于获利目标会导致回调，它们是
多头趋势中的阻力（多头获利了结时平仓）和
空头趋势中的支撑（空头获利了结时反弹）

The extreme winners and losers are rare and 
tend to cancel one another out 
This is not a strong buy setup 
Most setups are higher probability 
and have smaller risk 
o

If take 100 trades and go for lx risk when high probability and

@Albrooksall
极端的大赢和大亏很少见且
大赢和大亏：样本误差
倾向于相互抵消
这不是一个强势的做多建仓架构
大多数建仓架构有更高的成功率
和更小的风险

如果进行100次交易并在高概率时追求一倍风险，
而在成功率低时追求两倍风险，净盈利的概率非常高

not the extreme winners or losers

to not buy entire position at one time, because might 
end up buying the high of the next year or two

wants to buy 10,000 units of XYZ 
Plans to hold for 5 years

Short-term Traders: Scale in to Increase Probability 
Day traders and short term traders, scale into losing 
trades, to increase probability of profit, and to reduce 
the chance of a loss

Profit on 2nd buy

expecting continued BO

to avoid loss

万单位）的风险

''Skunk'' Stops: Exiting in the Middle Kills Account 
If you buy anywhere during rally, 
even at the top, 
stop is below Major HL 
Stop 
Several reasonable exits to minimize loss 
Premise still valid so can hold long and 
rely on stop 
If decided to rely on stop, 
don't exit on stop 
between reasonable exit 
and original stop 
01+0~ 
These are ''Skunk'' stops 
They stink and your account gets killed 
in the middle of the road

“臭鼬”止损：
在中间退出会毁掉账户
有几个合理的退出点以最小化亏损。市场环境
如果你在反弹的任何位置做多，
即使是在顶部，
止损也设在主要高点下方
仍然有效，因此可以持有多头并依赖止损。
如果决定依赖止损，不要在合理退出点和原始止损之间止损退出
这些都是“臭鼬”止损。它们很糟糕，你的账户会在中途被摧毁

Trade Management: Comes after Entering 
Traders always take trades for a reason 
They have a goal (profit target) 
They protect themselves, 
if the goal is not achieved (stop) 
Buy PB from BO of TR 
Trade management comes after entering a trade 
It is following your plan, if the price action is what you expect 
It is changing your plan, if it is not 
Always be ready to exit, even with a loss, if premise no longer valid 
BrooksTradingCourse.com 
BrooksPriceAction.com 
Slide 2 
@Albrooksall
交易者总是出于某种原因进行交易
他们有一个目标（盈利目标）
交易管理：在进入交易后进行
如果目标未能达成，他们会保护自己（止损）
交易管理在进入交易后进行
如果价格走势符合你的预期，则按照计划行事
如果不符，则改变你的计划。一旦前提不再有效，即使亏损也要随时准备退出。
在交易区间的突破时的回调附近做多

of consecutive big bear bars

或在向上反转时获利了结
没有完全达到刮头皮交易者的盈利目标
在更低的高点、楔形、看跌旗形上方做空失败的突破，
尝试获得2倍初始风险的利润
在刮头皮交易时，如果接近目标，
将止损移至盈亏平衡位置

Main Points: Other People's Money Is Never True 
■ Management comes after entering trade 
■ Other People's Money is never true

OPM: Other People's Money Is Never True 
OPM is one of the dumbest concepts in trading 
Sell strong BO 
Strong Final Flag reversal 
Strong buy signal bar 
Beginner holds short, 
thinking that his open profit 
is other people's money 
Beginner moves stop to breakeven 
Doesn't worry about giving back profit, 
because it is OPM 
NO!! ONCE IN YOUR ACCOUNT, IT IS YOUR MONEY! 
Protect it 
This is a strong buy signal, so must exit shorts 
Never base your exit on your entry price 
Always manage trades based on current price action
